subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the Fragrances of God! Be rejoiced through the grace of thy Lord and happy through the bounties of thy God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله استبشری بفضل مولاک و افرحی بالطاف ربک الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant
